name: hub
description: Hub-and-spoke: independent work streams converge on a central integration milestone.

jobs.title: [Infra] Plan cloud architecture
jobs.body: Choose regions, instance types, network topology.

jobs.title: [Infra] Write Terraform modules
jobs.body: Codify the architecture plan as reusable Terraform modules.

jobs.title: [Infra] Set up CI pipeline
jobs.body: GitHub Actions / Forgejo CI: lint, plan, apply on merge.

jobs.title: [Auth] Design auth flow
jobs.body: Decide on OAuth2 / OIDC provider and token lifecycle.

jobs.title: [Auth] Implement auth middleware
jobs.body: JWT validation, refresh logic, role extraction.

jobs.title: [Auth] Auth integration tests
jobs.body: Token issuance, expiry, revocation, RBAC boundary tests.

jobs.title: [Frontend] UX wireframes
jobs.body: Figma mockups for all primary screens.

jobs.title: [Frontend] Wire frontend to API
jobs.body: Connect component library to REST endpoints, add auth header injection.

jobs.title: [Data] Define core data model
jobs.body: Entity definitions, field types, validation rules.

jobs.title: [Data] Write DB migrations
jobs.body: Alembic / Flyway migration scripts for the core model.

jobs.title: [Data] Seed data & fixtures
jobs.body: Dev/staging seed data, factory helpers for tests.

jobs.title: Integration milestone: all streams merged
jobs.body: Smoke-test the full stack: infra provisioned, auth working, frontend connected, data migrated.

jobs.title: Load testing & performance tuning
jobs.body: k6 / Locust scenarios, identify bottlenecks, apply fixes.

jobs.title: Security audit
jobs.body: SAST scan, dependency audit, pen-test checklist.

jobs.title: Production release
jobs.body: Final go/no-go checklist, tag, deploy, announce.
